title: Ring of Animal Influence
summary: This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast one of the following spells:

contentBlocks.text: Ring of Animal Influence Ring, rare
This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast one of the following spells:
• Animal friendship (save DC 13) • Fear (save DC 13), targeting only beasts that have an Intelligence of 3 or lower • Speak with animals
